anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: Powerton Engineering ta sanya aikin amfani da makamashin rana ya zama mai sauƙi da kuma sauƙi. Ƙungiyarsu ta ɗauki kula da komai daga farko zuwa ƙarshe, kuma muna jin daɗi sosai da sakamakon.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: Na yi farin ciki da zaɓar Powerton Engineering don shigarwar mu, kuma ba zan dadin yin wa kowane ɗan uwana shawara ba.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Samfuran inganci na musamman da sabis na abokan ciniki na musamman. Ƙwarewar fasaha ta ƙungiyar tana da ban sha'awa kuma tana da ƙwarewa sosai.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Yin aiki tare da Powerton Engineering ya kasance gogewa mai ban mamaki. Hanyoyin sarrafa su ta atomatik sun canza tsarin samarwa mu kuma sun inganta inganci da kashi 35%. An ba da shawarar sosai don ayyukan sarrafa masana'antu ta atomatik.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Sabis na musamman da tallafin fasaha! Ƙungiyar ta ba da jagora na musamman yayin aiwatar da aikinmu na rana. Hanyarsu ta sana'a da isar da lokaci sun wuce tsammaninmu gaba ɗaya.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: Powerton Engineering ta kai daidai abin da suka yi alkawari. Tsarin kayan aikin auna da suka shigar ya kasance yana aiki da kyau sama da shekaru biyu. Tallafin su bayan sayar da kyan gani ne kuma ko da yaushe suna amsa.

productSections.needSolarInverterSolutions: Kuna buƙatar Hanyoyin Inverter na Rana?
productSections.surgeProtectionDescription: Masana mu na kariya za su iya tsara cikakkun tsarin kariya na rarrafe don shigarwa.
productSections.solarInverterDescription: Injiniyoyin mu na makamashin rana za su iya tsara mafi kyawun tsarin inverter don shigarwar ku ta rana.
productSections.solarChargeDescription: Masana mu na makamashin rana za su iya taimaka muku zaɓar daidaitaccen mai sarrafa caji don tsarin baturin ku.
productSections.energyStorageDescription: Masana mu na adana makamashi za su iya tsara mafi kyawun tsarin baturi don shigarwar ku ta rana.

chatbot.welcome: Barka da zuwa Powerton Engineering! Yaya zan iya taimaka muku yau?

defaultOptions.regularBusinessHours: ⏰ Lokutan aiki na yau da kullun

responses.products: Muna ba da cikakkun samfuran sarrafa masana'antu, kayan lantarki, na'urori, tsarin hasken rana da sauransu. Wanne irin samfurori ne kuke nema?
responses.services: Hidimominmu sun haɗa da shigarwa, kulawa, daidaitawa, tallafin fasaha da mafita na musamman. Wanne hidimar ne kuka fi so?
responses.contact: Kuna iya kiran mu a +91-9911315121 ko aika mana imel a info@powertonengineering.com. Ofishinmu yana Delhi, India.
responses.quote: Zan yi farin ciki in taimaka muku sami farashin! Don Allah ku ziyarci shafin farashinmu ko ku ba ni bukatunku.
responses.support: Ƙungiyar tallafin fasaharmu tana nan don taimaka! Don Allah bayyana tambayar fasaha ko matsalar ku.
responses.productSelection: Kyakkyawa! Muna da iri-iri na samfuran masana'antu a rukuni daban-daban. Wanne rukuni ne ya fi sha'awarku?
responses.serviceSelection: Muna ba da cikakkun hidimun injiniya don tallafa wa ayyukanku daga farko har ƙarshe. Wanne hidimar ne za mu iya taimaka muku?
responses.troubleshootingMain: Ina nan don taimaka muku wajen warware matsalolin fasaha. Wanne irin matsalar ne kuke fuskanta?
responses.companyInfo: Powerton Engineering babbar kamfani ce a fannin sarrafa masana'antu da injiniyan lantarki mai shekaru sama da 15 na gwaninta. Muna hidima ga abokan ciniki a duk faɗin duniya da cikakkun mafita.
responses.sensorsCategory: Layinmu na na'urori da kayan aunawa ya ƙunshi na'urori masu daidaito don amfanin masana'antu. Wanne irin auna ne kuke bukata?
responses.electricalCategory: Muna ba da iri-iri na kayan lantarki don amfanin masana'antu, har da kayan rarraba wutar lantarki, sarrafawa da aminci. Wanne kayan lantarki ne kuke bukata?
responses.automationCategory: Tsarinmu na sarrafa kai ya ƙunshi tsarin PLC, SCADA, DCS da HMI don cikakken sarrafa masana'antu. Wanne aikin sarrafa kai ne za mu iya warware muku?
responses.solarCategory: Muna ba da cikakkun mafita na hasken rana daga panels har zuwa shigarwa da kulawa. Wanne aikin hasken rana ne kuke shirye-shirye?
responses.safetyCategory: Aminci ya fi komai muhimmanci a ayyukan masana'antu. Muna ba da cikakkun kayan kariya da aminci. Wanne kayan aminci ne kuke bukata?
responses.installationService: Ƙungiyoyin gwanayen shigarwarmu suna tabbatar da daidaitaccen saiti da saita tsarinku na masana'antu. Wanne kaya ne ya bukaci shigarwa?
responses.electricalTroubleshooting: Zan iya taimaka muku wajen gano matsalolin lantarki. Matsaloli na yau da kullun sun haɗa da rasa wutar lantarki, kunna kariya da matsalolin ƙasa. Wanne alamar ne kuke gani?
responses.sensorTroubleshooting: Matsalolin na'urori na iya shafar daidaiton aunawa. Matsaloli na yau da kullun sau da yawa sun haɗa da karkatar da daidaito, tsangwama da sigina da abubuwan muhalli. Wanne matsalar na'ura ne kuke fuskanta?
responses.automationSearch: Zan iya taimaka muku neman mafi kyawun mafita na sarrafa kai! Irinmu ya ƙunshi tsarin PLC, SCADA, interfaces HMI da cikakkun fakitin sarrafawa.
responses.solarSearch: Kyakkyawa! Mafitanmu na hasken rana sun haɗa da cikakken ƙirar tsarin, shigarwa da hidimun kulawa don amfanin gida, kasuwanci da masana'antu.
responses.mechanicalSearch: Zaɓi mai kyau! Muna ba da iri-iri na injuna, famfuna, bawuloli da kayan injina don amfani daban-daban na masana'antu.
responses.serviceSearch: Kyakkyawa! Hidimominmu sun haɗa da daidaitawa, shirye-shiryen kulawa, tallafin gaggawa da cikakkun mafita na horarwa.
responses.contactSearch: Ga duk hanyoyin tuntuɓe mu! Muna samuwa ta hanyoyi daban-daban don sauƙin ku.
responses.powerSupplyHelp: Matsalolin wutar lantarki na iya zama masu muhimmanci. Matsaloli na yau da kullun sun haɗa da jujjuyawar voltage, kaya da yawa, karkatar da sauti da gazawar kayan. Bari in taimake ku neman daidai mafita.
responses.temperatureSensorHelp: Daidaiton aunawan zafin jiki yana da muhimmanci don sarrafa matakai. Matsaloli sau da yawa sun haɗa da karkatar da daidaito, tsangwama na muhalli ko tsufa na na'ura. Ga yadda za mu iya taimakawa.
responses.plcTroubleshooting: Matsalolin PLC na iya dakatar da samarwa. Matsaloli na yau da kullun sun haɗa da kurakuran shirye-shirye, gazawar I/O, kurakuran sadarwa da matsalolin wutar lantarki. Mu mayar da tsarinku yin aiki.
responses.solarPerformanceHelp: Matsalolin aikin tsarin hasken rana na iya shafar samar da wutar lantarki sosai. Dalilan gama gari sun haɗa da gazawar inverter, datti a panels, inuwa da gazawar tsarin sa ido.

chatbotMessages.quoteHelp: Zan yi murna taimaka muku sami farashin na musamman! Tsarinmu na farashin yana da gasa kuma a fili. Don madaidaicin farashin, muna bukata mu fahimci bukatunku na musamman. Bari in haɗa ku da ƙungiyar tallace-tallacemu don cikakken tattaunawa.
chatbotMessages.helpAssist: Ina nan don taimaka muku a kowane mataki! Ko kuwa kuna bukata jagora wajen zaɓar samfurori, takaitaccen bayanin fasaha, tallafin hidima ko kawai sanin ƙari game da kamfaninmu, ina cikin hidimar ku. Yaya zan iya taimaka muku yau?
chatbotMessages.businessHoursInfo: Muna nan lokacin da kuke bukatarmu! Lokutan aikinmu shine Litinin har Asabar: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM. Muna kuma ba da tallafin gaggawa ranar Lahadi don yanayi masu muhimmanci. Wurin: Noida, Yanki 6, F-25, F Block (Metro mafi kusa: Yanki 15).
chatbotMessages.pricingInfo: Tsarinmu na farashin koyaushe yana da gasa kuma a fili! Mun gaskata wajen ba da kima ga kuɗi ba tare da boye farashi ba. Farashin ya danganta da takaitaccen bayani, yawa da fa'idar aikin. Don mafi madaidaicin farashin, ƙungiyarmu za ta kimanta bukatunku na musamman.
chatbotMessages.achievements: Muna alfahari da nasarorinmu! Sama da ayyuka 500 da suka yi nasara an kammala, hidima ga manyan abokan ciniki sama da 50, shekaru sama da 15 na gwaninta, da haɗin gwiwa da jagororin masana'antu kamar Thermax, Motherson da Praj Industries. Ayyukanmu na musamman sun haɗa da shigarwar hasken rana na 10MW da tsarin sarrafa magunguna.
chatbotMessages.mainMenu: Barka da dawo babban menu! Ina nan don taimaka da duk wani bukatu na sarrafa masana'antu. Ko kuna neman samfurori, hidimomi, tallafin fasaha ko bayanin kamfani, zan jagorance ku zuwa daidai mafita. Yaya zan iya taimakawa?
chatbotMessages.urgentSupport: Yanayi masu gaggawa sun haɗa da: gazawar kayan da ke shafar samarwa, batutuwa masu muhimmanci na aminci, lalacewar gaggawa, lokutan shigarwa da gazawar tsarin. Don waɗannan yanayi, ku kira nan da nan +91-94627-71662. Muna ba da tallafin gaggawa na 24/7 don yanayi masu muhimmanci.
chatbotMessages.productComparison: Zan iya taimaka muku kwatanta samfurori! Fa'idojeninmu sun haɗa da na'urori, tsarin sarrafa kai, kayan lantarki da samfuran hasken rana. Gaya mini wanne takaitaccen samfurori kuke kwatantawa ko don wanne amfani kuke bukatarsu, kuma zan jagorance ku ta hanyar mafi kyawun zaɓuɓɓuka.
chatbotMessages.defaultResponse: Na gode da tuntuɓe mu! Ina nan don taimaka muku newan cikakkiyar mafita ta sarrafa masana'antu. A Powerton Engineering, mun gaskata cewa kowane abokin ciniki ya cancanci kulawa na musamman da jagorar ƙwararru. Wanne ƙalubale ko bukata na musamman zan iya taimaka muku da ita yau?
chatbotMessages.productsPageResponse: Cikakke! Na kai ku shafin samfurorinmu inda za ku iya bincika fa'idojenmu na mafita na sarrafa masana'antu. Za ku sami cikakkun takaitaccen bayani, hotuna da bayanan fasaha na kowanne rukuni na samfur. Kuna bukata taimako neman wani abu na musamman ko kuna da tambayoyi game da samfur?
chatbotMessages.servicesPageResponse: Zaɓi mai kyau! Shafin hidimominmu yana nuna cikakkun tallafi daga shigarwa har zuwa kulawa. Mu abokin ciniki ne na cikakkiyar injiniya don dukan rayuwar aikin. Wanne irin tallafin hidima kuke nema?
chatbotMessages.contactPageResponse: Kyakkyawa! Shafin tuntuɓa yana da duk bayananmu har da wurin ofishi, lambobin waya da takardar tuntuɓa. Muna Noida kuma muna samuwa Litinin har Asabar. Kada ku yi shakka ku tuntuɓe mu kowane lokaci! Kuna so ku tattauna wani abu na musamman da ƙungiyarmu?

thermal-plant.title: Thermal Power Plant Automation
thermal-plant.description: Complete automation solution for 250MW thermal power plant including control panels, SCADA systems, and safety interlocks.

pharma-plant.title: Pharmaceutical Plant Control System
pharma-plant.description: Advanced process control and monitoring system for pharmaceutical manufacturing with FDA compliance and data integrity features.

solar-plant.title: 10MW Solar Power Installation
solar-plant.description: Complete design and installation of grid-connected solar power plant with monitoring systems and grid synchronization equipment.

water-treatment.title: Municipal Water Treatment Automation
water-treatment.description: Automated control system for water treatment plant serving 500,000 residents with real-time monitoring and quality control.

industrial-automation-demo.title: Demo: Industrial Automation System
industrial-automation-demo.description: Demonstration of complete manufacturing automation capabilities including PLC integration, SCADA systems, and real-time monitoring solutions.

power-distribution-demo.title: Example: Power Distribution Control
power-distribution-demo.description: Example power distribution system showcasing automated load balancing and remote monitoring capabilities for power generation facilities.
